docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,460.00 FILED BY VALERA, TIFFANY AS TO DEFENDANT EXPEDIA, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-09-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
